annexure_reference: Annexure I: Rynette confirms SARS documentation uploaded (30 Jun 2025)
pipeline: Neon DB → Graph API body/attachment sync → EML generation → Transport header fetch

envelope.subject: RE: SARS query re the two big inter company invoices at the end of February 2025

body.preview:
Hi

I uploaded all the documentation they asked for.

Regards





From: Danie Bantjes <danie.bantjes@gmail.com>

chain_of_custody.extraction_method: Microsoft Graph API v1.0 (client credentials flow)
chain_of_custody.verification: SPF/DKIM/DMARC authentication via internet message headers
